hero.title: Contact Oullin.
copy: Oullin is open to conversations about high-availability software, AI-era modernisation, architecture, and delivery in regulated and high-trust environments.
We take a limited number of engagements at a time. If you're working on a system that has to hold — and needs senior engineering judgment close to the architecture — start the conversation here.

primaryChannel.label: Primary channel
primaryChannel.copy: Email is the fastest way to reach Oullin for architecture, AI consulting, modernisation, and transformation enquiries. Come with context: your current stack, the problem you're trying to solve, and any constraints. We respond within 48 hours to enquiries with enough detail for a real conversation.

bestFit.label: Best fit
items: Projects: AI architecture, modernisation, resilient delivery, banking, healthcare, e-commerce, loyalty and customer engagement
Environments: regulated, high-trust, AI-era change, fintech, scale-up, high-availability infrastructure
Approach: direct, senior, hands-on, embedded close to delivery

intro.label: What Happens Next
intro.title: Clarity from the first exchange.
intro.lead: No pitch decks. No proposals that take two weeks. A straight answer from the first conversation.

process.label: // process
items: — We respond within 48 hours if there's enough context to have a real conversation.
— If it's a fit, we schedule a 30-minute call — your stack, your problem, your constraints.
— We give you a straight read: whether we can help, which engagement fits, and what it costs.
— If we proceed: a one-page scope document within 48 hours.

email.label: Email
email.copyAfterLink: for architecture, AI consulting, modernisation, and transformation discussions.

social.label: Social
social.unavailableCopy: Social channels are currently unavailable. Email remains the best way to reach Oullin.

founder.label: Founder
founder.copy: Gustavo Ocanto leads Oullin's work directly, so enquiries stay close to architecture, delivery, and technical decision-making rather than getting filtered through layers.

seo.description: Start a conversation about AI architecture, modernisation, and delivery in regulated environments. No pitch decks. Clarity from the first exchange.
